name: Spanish Flan
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 Packets Unflavored Gelatin, dissolved in 1/4 cup Warm Water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, scald milk until hot and mix with lemon peel until mixture is very hot but not boiling.
2. Dissolve gelatin in warm water and add to beaten egg mixture. Mix well and stir into the hot milk with sugar.
3. Cook on low heat until mixture begins to boil, then remove from stove.
4. In another saucepan over low heat, caramelize 5 tablespoons of sugar.
5. Pour caramelized sugar into mold, followed by flan mixture. Allow to cool to room temperature.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. To serve, place mold in hot water for a few seconds and invert onto serving plate. Serve chilled.
